ChatRequest.description:
Request model for the agent.
Contains the user query and, optionally, the conversation_id.
The `stream` flag is accepted for compatibility, but the dedicated
streaming endpoint is `/chat/stream`.

max_response_tokens.description: Upper bound on response tokens. Hard-capped at 16000 to prevent unbounded streams.
max_response_tokens.title: Max Response Tokens

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest

CreateTenantRequest.description: Payload for creating a new tenant.
CreateTenantRequest.title: CreateTenantRequest

auth_token.description: Pre-issued JWT session token for the marketplace hub. Preferred: use ``github_token`` instead so the marketplace hub owns the exchange flow.
auth_token.title: Auth Token

github_token.description: GitHub OAuth access token for the submitting user. The framework exchanges it against the marketplace's ``/auth/github/exchange`` endpoint to obtain a JWT, matching the browser login flow (``/auth/login/github``). Typically forwarded by the Backstage Scaffolder via ``${{ secrets.USER_OAUTH_TOKEN }}``.
github_token.title: Github Token

plugin_path.description: Absolute path (on the framework host) to the plugin directory to zip and submit. Typically mounted from the Backstage Scaffolder workspace.
plugin_path.title: Plugin Path

registry_url.description: Override the marketplace hub URL (defaults to the framework's OFFICIAL_MARKETPLACE_URL).
registry_url.title: Registry Url

Tenant.description:
Data model representing a system tenant.

Attributes:
    id: Unique tenant identifier (slug).
    name: Human-readable display name.
    status: Operational status (active, suspended, etc.).
    created_at: ISO timestamp of creation.
Tenant.title: Tenant

get.description: Standard A2A agent-card discovery endpoint.

schema.title: Response Wellknown Agent Card  Well Known Agent Json Get

get.description: Alias for the agent card under the /a2a prefix.

schema.title: Response Agent Card Alias A2A Agent Card Get

get.description: Restituisce la pagina Admin (protetta da Basic Auth).

Returns analytics/feedback data in JSON format (protected by Basic Auth).
- Aggregated totals (positive, negative, percentages)
- Daily time series
- Recent feedback with metadata and sources
- Most cited queries and documents in the selected period

parameters.description: Time window (in days) to consider for analytics. Use values >0.
parameters.name: days

schema.description: Time window (in days) to consider for analytics. Use values >0.
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of recent feedbacks to return.
parameters.name: recent_limit

schema.description: Number of recent feedbacks to return.
schema.title: Recent Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of entries for popular queries/documents.
parameters.name: top_limit

schema.description: Maximum number of entries for popular queries/documents.
schema.title: Top Limit

delete.description: Clear the entire dead-letter queue (Basic Auth).

get.description: List dead-lettered jobs, most-recently-failed first (Basic Auth).

delete.description: Drop a single dead-lettered job record (Basic Auth).

get.description: Return full detail (including traceback) for one dead-lettered job.

post.description: Re-enqueue a dead-lettered job onto its original queue (Basic Auth).

get.description: List all tenants.

schema.title: Response List Tenants Admin Tenants Get

get.description: Returns all BaselithCore plugins as Backstage Component entities in the EntityProvider full-mutation format.  Poll this endpoint from a Backstage CustomEntityProvider or a scheduled sync job.

schema.title: Response Get All Entities Api Backstage Entities Get

get.description: Returns the Backstage Component entity dict for one plugin.  The response body is valid YAML-serialisable content for a catalog-info.yaml file.

schema.title: Response Get Entity Api Backstage Entities  Plugin Name  Get

get.description: Returns the Backstage label keys for all Agentic Design Patterns detected in the plugin's source code, manifest tags, and resource declarations.  Cached after first call; invalidated on hot-reload.

schema.title: Response Get Plugin Patterns Api Backstage Entities  Plugin Name  Patterns Get

get.description: Returns the operational status of the Backstage exporter.

schema.title: Response Get Backstage Health Api Backstage Health Get

post.description: Thin wrapper around ``PluginPublisher.publish`` so Backstage Scaffolder steps can submit a plugin bundle without shelling out to the ``baselith`` CLI. The plugin must live on the framework host; the Scaffolder is responsible for staging the source via ``fetch:plain`` + ``fetch:template`` before calling this endpoint.

schema.title: Response Submit To Marketplace Api Backstage Publish Post

post.summary: Submit a plugin directly to the marketplace hub

get.description: Returns the Backstage Scaffolder template that submits an existing plugin directly to the Baselith Marketplace hub.
Returns the standard Baselith plugin scaffolding template for Backstage.

List all plugins with their current state.

Returns:
    List of plugins with metadata and state information
Return manifest of all plugin frontend assets for injection.

Get metrics for all tracked plugins.

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping plugin names to their metrics

Get system-wide plugin metrics.

Returns:
    Aggregated metrics across all plugins

Get performance summary for all plugins.

Returns:
    Performance statistics (load times, reload times, error rates)

delete.description:
Reset all plugin metrics.

Returns:
    Success message

Reset metrics for a specific plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin

Returns:
    Success message

get.description:
Get detailed metrics for a specific plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin

Returns:
    Plugin metrics including timing, errors, state history

post.description:
Reload all active plugins.

Returns:
    Dictionary mapping plugin names to reload status

schema.title: Response Reload All Plugins Api Plugins Reload All Post

get.description:
Get overview of plugin system status.

Returns:
    Lifecycle summary and dependency graph

Get detailed information about a specific plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin

Returns:
    Plugin details including state, metadata, and dependencies

schema.title: Response Get Plugin Info Api Plugins  Plugin Name  Get

get.description:
Get list of plugins that depend on this plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin

Returns:
    List of dependent plugin names

post.description:
Disable an active plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin to disable

Returns:
    Action response with success status

Enable a disabled plugin.

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin to enable
    request: Enable request with optional configuration

Returns:
    Action response with success status

Reload a plugin (hot-reload).

Args:
    plugin_name: Name of the plugin to reload
    request: Reload request with optional new configuration

Returns:
    Action response with success status

Main endpoint for querying the agent.
Delegated to ChatService which handles retrieval, reranking, caching, and response generation.
Returns the agent response as a stream (text chunks).

get.description:
Serve the main entry point for the frontend SPA.
Any path under /console/ is redirected to the index.html to allow
client-side routing to take over.

Serve the main entry point for the frontend SPA.
Any path under /console/ is redirected to the index.html to allow
client-side routing to take over.

post.description:
Records a feedback (positive|negative) for a generated response.
- Data is saved to the PostgreSQL database (configurable via the dedicated environment variables).

get.description:
Returns all saved feedback entries.
- If `feedback` is specified, filters by type ('positive' or 'negative').

parameters.description: Filter results by feedback type: 'positive' or 'negative'
parameters.name: feedback

schema.description: Filter results by feedback type: 'positive' or 'negative'
schema.title: Feedback

parameters.description: Limit the number of returned records (max 200)
parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Limit the number of returned records (max 200)
schema.title: Limit

get.description:
Liveness probe — process is up. Cheap, no dependency checks, no auth.

Use for Kubernetes ``livenessProbe``: it must only fail if the process is
wedged, never because a downstream dependency is unavailable (that is the
readiness probe's job).

Readiness probe — checks critical dependencies (no auth).

Returns HTTP 503 when the database is unreachable so Kubernetes removes the
pod from Service endpoints (traffic draining) until it recovers. Redis is
reported but advisory: the framework degrades to in-memory fallbacks, so it
does not gate readiness. Results are cached (~30s) to bound probe overhead.

schema.title: Response Trigger Bootstrap Index Bootstrap Post

get.description: Retrieve the current status of the background indexing engine.

schema.title: Response Index Status Index Status Get

get.description: Export Prometheus metrics registered in the process.

post.description:
Performs an incremental indexing of local documents (synchronous operation).
- Markdown files are read from the folder configured in ``DOCUMENTS_PATH`` (.env)
- Paths and vector store parameters are defined via .env (QDRANT_PATH, COLLECTION_NAME)

get.description:
Returns the system status:
- Number of indexed documents
- Qdrant collection in use (from .env)
- Synthetic metrics (no paths/files)
